prompt: Logo design on pure white (#FFFFFF) background. A rectangle with a thick yellow (#FAFA00) border outline (3-4px), sharp corners. Inside is white. In the center, two lines of text stacked: 'MM' on top and 'AGENCY' below, both in bold black (#000000) uppercase. CRITICAL: Both words use the EXACT SAME typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same weight, same style for every letter. Wide rectangular strokes, sharp 90-degree corners. No rounded edges on letters or rectangle. Clean vector quality, flat design, centered on white background.
negative_prompt: black background, dark background, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, 3D, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, thin lines, lowercase, rounded corners, rounded font, different fonts, mixed typefaces, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, grunge, noise, texture
